form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Last start ran on from midfield and won by 2.75 len at Wyong Provmid Champ March 28 over 1350m in soft going defeating Flying Embers with 57.5kg at $4. The start before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; scored a big 3.5 len win at Hawkesbury Mid Bm68 March 17 over 1300m defeating Vetwelve with 60kg at $1.75. In career best form but will need a ton of luck from the wide gate.
